title: Montana Renewables Announces Closing of $1.44 Billion DOE Loan Facility for Renewable Fuels and Biomass Energy Facility
content: Calumet, Inc.  announced the closing of a $1.44 billion guaranteed loan facility with the U.S. Department of Energy (Гўв‚¬Е“DOEГўв‚¬Вќ) Loan Programs Office (Гўв‚¬Е“LPOГўв‚¬Вќ). The loan will fund the construction and expansion of the renewable fuels facility owned by Montana Renewables, LLC (Гўв‚¬Е“Montana RenewablesГўв‚¬Вќ or Гўв‚¬Е“MRLГўв‚¬Вќ), an unrestricted subsidiary of Calumet.
author: Analysts Account
